body.title: Seed PROC_SLATE_RITUAL — Igor handles /slate: reads context, discusses priorities, coordinates with Claude
body.result: seeded via claudecode/seed_process_habits.py (6712d67) — PROC_SLATE_RITUAL cognitive habit, trigger: /slate start slate plan the slate
body.description: Seed a workflow habit PROC_SLATE_RITUAL triggered by '/slate' or 'start slate' or 'plan the slate'. Igor reads ~/.TheIgors/cc_channel/slate.md, reads recent channel, discusses open tickets and priorities with Akien, posts a coordination message to channel signaling Claude to engage. Gives Igor the vocabulary and steps for the slate ritual as if it were Claude running the /slate skill.
